startIndex.description: The starting number for this ordered list. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

checked.description: If present, this item is a checklist item. true = checked, false = unchecked. If absent, this is a normal list item.

children.description: Nested ordered list items. Mutually exclusive with unorderedListChildren; if both are present, children takes precedence.

unorderedListChildren.description: A nested unordered list. Mutually exclusive with children; if both are present, children takes precedence.
